2606.24825.title: L3Cube-MahaPOS: A Marathi Part-of-Speech Tagging Dataset and BERT Models
2606.24825.paper_summary: Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging is a foundational NLP task underpinning machine translation, information extraction, and syntactic parsing. Despite Marathi being spoken by over 83 million people and ranking among the top twenty most spoken languages worldwide, it remains severely under-resourced in annotated corpora and standardised evaluation benchmarks. Marathi presents unique challenges for computational modelling owing to its rich morphology, relatively free word order, lack of capitalisation conventions, and pervasive code-mixing with Hindi and English. We introduce L3Cube-MahaPOS, a gold-standard POS tagging dataset for Marathi comprising 32,354 manually annotated sentences drawn from news text. Annotation was performed entirely manually by a team of Marathi-proficient annotators following a 16-tag Universal Dependencies-aligned scheme. A structured preprocessing pipeline covering Unicode normalisation, Devanagari-aware tokenisation, and noise filtering ensures label consistency across all splits. We benchmark the dataset across six model families spanning HMM, CRF, BiLSTM, BiLSTM+CharCNN, MuRIL, and the Marathi-specific transformer MahaBERT-v2. The best system achieves 88.67\% token-level accuracy and a macro-F1 of 81.67% over 15 evaluated tag classes. We release the dataset, annotation guidelines, and trained model checkpoints to foster further research in Marathi NLP.
2606.24825.paper_summary_zh: 詞性標註（POS tagging）是支撐機器翻譯、信息提取和句法解析的基礎自然語言處理任務。儘管馬拉地語有超過8300萬人使用，並且在全球最常用語言中排名前二十，但在標註語料和標準化評估基準方面仍然資源匱乏。由於其豐富的形態學、相對自由的詞序、缺乏大寫慣例以及與印地語和英語的廣泛代碼混合，馬拉地語對計算建模提出了獨特的挑戰。我們介紹L3Cube-MahaPOS，一個針對馬拉地語的金標準詞性標註數據集，包含32,354個從新聞文本中提取的手動標註句子。標註完全由一組精通馬拉地語的標註者手動執行，遵循16標籤的通用依賴對齊方案。結構化的預處理管道涵蓋Unicode正規化、考慮德萬納里文的分詞和噪音過濾，確保所有分割中的標籤一致性。我們在六個模型家族中對數據集進行基準測試，涵蓋HMM、CRF、BiLSTM、BiLSTM+CharCNN、MuRIL以及馬拉地語特定的TransformerMahaBERT-v2。最佳系統在15個評估標籤類別上達到88.67%的標記級準確率和81.67%的宏F1分數。我們釋放數據集、標註指南和訓練模型檢查點，以促進馬拉地語NLP的進一步研究。
2606.24825.author: Hariom Ingle et.al.
2606.24825.authors: Hariom Ingle, Ronit Ghode, Ishwari Gondkar, Jidnyasa Harad, Raviraj Joshi
